title: Freddie Christiansen
summary: Freddie Christiansen has served on the Old Harbor Native Corporation Board of Directors since 2008. Freddie brings a new and enthusiastic perspective to the Board of Directors. title: Loretta Nelson
summary: Kodiak Area Native Association Loretta Nelson is the daughter of Willis and Martha Nelson from Afognak and Port Lions. title: Brenda Rebne
summary: Ahtna Villages An Ahtna shareholder, Brenda Rebne is a tribal member of the Native Village of Cantwell. title: Tabetha Toloff
summary: As CIRI’s president, Tabetha Toloff oversees the Company’s ANCSA mission and operations, spearheads stakeholder engagement, and provides strategic oversight of the Corporate Affairs and Shareholder + Descendant Programs departments.
